name: Corn Sausage Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 2 Loaves stale bread, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage in a large skillet, stirring to break up, until browned. Remove from the skillet.
2. Pour off all but 1/4 cup of sausage fat.
3. Cook onion in the remaining fat until soft.
4. In a large bowl, combine bread cubes with parsley, poultry seasoning, salt, and pepper.
5. Add onion mixture, sausage, and corn to the bowl. Toss until well combined.
6. Gradually add broth until you achieve the desired consistency.
